titleStmt.title: SII 20.40: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 40. (B.K. No. 43 of 1937-38.) MĀRASANHAḶḶI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Patil's house near Lakshmī temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 988, Parābhava, Pushya, śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding regularly to A.D. 1066, December 24.

It registers the gift of the village Mārasiṁganapaḷḷi for feeding the ascetics and students of the maṭha attached to Uttarēśvara temple of Eḷemēla and also for their medicines and charity house, by the prince Trailōkyamalla-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permāḍi-Jayasiṁhadēva, who was governing Tarddavāḍi-1000. The gift was entrusted to Sōmēśvara-paṇḍita of Pāśupata school.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha
mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salutta
mire . tatpriyātmajaṁ samastabhuvanastutamahā
mahimōdayōllasitapallavānvaya śrīpri
thvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ kāṁ
cīpuravarēśvaraṁ vidagdhaviḷāsinīviḷōcanacakōra
candraṁ pratyakṣadēvēndraṁ vikrāntakaṇṭhīravaṁ maṇḍaḷikabhai
ravaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ cāḷukyadikkuṁjaraṁ
vandibṛndasantarppaṇaṁ vijayalakṣmīmukhadarppaṇaṁ rāya
kumāracamatkāraṁ kīrttivallarīvaḷayitattriḷōkaṁ satyā
vaḷōkaṁ rājavidyāṁganābhujaṁganaṇnanasiṁgaṁ śrī ma
ttraiḷōkyamallanoḷaṁbapallavapermmāḍi jayasiṁha
dēvarttarddavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdadināḷdu rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . sakavarṣa
988 neya parābhava saṁvatsarada puṣya
suddha 5 Ādityavā ramuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu
śrīmadeḷemēla Uttarēśvara dēvara maṭhadalōduva
kēḷuva tapōdhanarggaṁ cchātrarggamaśanācchādapatthyau
ṣadhārtthamāgi vidyāsatrakkendu . śrī ballavarasaralli
paḍedu . yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhā
radhyānadhāraṇajapasamādhisaṁpannarppāśupata
yōgācāryyar śrīsōmēśvarapaṇḍitargge kālaṁ karcci
dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi Ubhayasāmyamumaṁ sarvvābhyanta
rasiddhiyiṁ koṭṭa 36 bāḍada baḷiya mārasiṁganapaḷḷi 1 . ©
© ślōkaṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanī
yō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrān
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacandraḥ . ©
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
